scope_note: This snapshot covers the FedRAMP-authorized managed-service vendors named in Phase 5d productivity and Phase 5 AI services. It is not a complete catalog of the FedRAMP Marketplace. Vendor authorization state changes weekly; verify at marketplace.fedramp.gov before citing in an SSP.

vendors.cui_suitability: Limited CUI scenarios with agency agreement
vendors.notes: For typical DFARS 7012 CUI, GCC High is the contractor path.

vendors.product: Microsoft 365 Government Community Cloud High (GCC High)
vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI under DFARS 7012; sovereign tenancy
vendors.notes: Common DIB contractor path. Physically and logically separated from commercial M365.

vendors.product: Google Workspace Enterprise Plus with Assured Controls Plus
vendors.authorization_type: JAB P-ATO (Google Workspace on FedRAMP High) + Assured Controls Plus overlay
vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI under DFARS 7012 with Assured Controls Plus overlay
vendors.notes: Overlay model (not sovereign tenancy). IL5 is roadmap; use M365 GCC High for IL5 productivity workloads.

vendors.product: Atlassian Government Cloud (Jira, Jira Service Management, Confluence)
vendors.cui_suitability: CUI scenarios with agency agreement (FedRAMP Moderate ceiling)
vendors.notes: Bitbucket Cloud is NOT in scope (per Atlassian trust page). 'FedRAMP High + IL5 on the horizon' per October 2025 announcement is roadmap, not current.
Widely mis-cited as FedRAMP Moderate; current authorization is High per ServiceNow's trust page. Initial FedRAMP High P-ATO August 2019. CNSSI 1253F Privacy Overlay High.

vendors.cui_suitability: Source-code-only low-risk SaaS; not a general CUI file store
vendors.notes: Tailored scopes around source code as low-risk data. CUI in issues, PR bodies, and attachments sits outside Tailored's design intent. FedRAMP Moderate is roadmap per GHEC Trust Center. October 2025 Copilot scope extension rides on the GHEC parent Tailored authorization.

vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI file collaboration under DFARS 7012
vendors.notes: DoD IL framing on the government solutions page is indirect; verify FedRAMP Marketplace package for specific IL claims before SSP citation.

vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI under DFARS 7012; model-availability subset per AWS GovCloud documentation
vendors.notes: Models in GovCloud (verified 2026-04-21): All Amazon Titan; Claude Sonnet 4.5; Claude 3.7 Sonnet; Claude 3.5 Sonnet v1; Claude 3 Haiku; Llama 3 70B; Llama 3 8B. Claude 3.5 Haiku, Claude 3.5 Sonnet v2, Claude 4.0 Sonnet, Claude 4.1 Opus, Claude 4.5 Haiku are NOT in GovCloud at the verification date.

vendors.product: Azure OpenAI Service in Azure Government
vendors.authorization_type: Authorized (August 2024 FedRAMP High; September 2024 IL4/IL5 via DISA)
vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI under DFARS 7012; IL6 out of CMMC L2 scope
vendors.notes: Regions: usgovarizona, usgovvirginia. Models (verified 2026-04-21): GPT-5.1 (2025-11-13); GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1-mini (2025-04-14); o3-mini (2025-01-31); GPT-4o (2024-11-20); text-embedding-3-large, text-embedding-3-small, text-embedding-ada-002. Retirements: gpt-4o 0513 and gpt-4o-mini 0718 retire 2026-03-31.

vendors.product: Vertex AI via Google Cloud Assured Workloads (FedRAMP High configuration)
vendors.package_hint: Google Cloud Assured Workloads - Vertex AI
vendors.cui_suitability: Appropriate for CUI under DFARS 7012 at IL2; IL5 is roadmap
vendors.notes: Claude 3.7 Sonnet confirmed at April 2025 announcement. Gemini and partner-model coverage via Vertex AI Model Garden varies; verify Assured Workloads release notes per-model before SSP citation. IL5 authorization is roadmap; IL5-requiring contracts route through Bedrock GovCloud or Azure OpenAI Government.
